message:
fix: prevent memory leaks and improve robustness

- idempotency.ts: Fix cached response handling by using new Response()
  instead of c.body() which could cause header modification issues
- context-health.service.ts: Guard against division by zero if maxTokens
  is explicitly set to 0 (nullish coalescing doesn't catch 0)
- hub.ts: Add cleanup functions to prevent memory leaks:
  - pruneUnusedBuffers() removes buffers for channels with no subscribers
  - getMemoryStats() returns memory usage for monitoring
  - startHubCleanupJob()/stopHubCleanupJob() for periodic cleanup
  - resetHub() for testing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
